name: lean-ctx
description: Context Runtime for AI Agents — 68 MCP tools, 10 read modes, 60+ shell patterns, tree-sitter AST for 18 languages. Compresses LLM context by up to 99%. Use when reading files, running shell commands, searching code, or exploring directories. Auto-installs if not present.
author: yvgude
summary_zh: 给 AI 智能体用的上下文运行时，通过结构化读取文件、执行命令和检索代码，把喂给大模型的上下文体积压缩到极致，适合处理大型代码库时省 token、提效率。
